changes.before: "If the captain lets us near his sick." Sylvanas had already found him: thickset, worn leather half-coat, planted by the well with the look of a man counting trouble.
changes.after: "If the captain lets us near his sick." Sylvanas had already found him, thickset in a worn leather half-coat, planted by the well with the look of a man counting trouble.

changes.before: He took in elven ears, Farstrider armor, then swords, and his mouth flattened.
changes.after: He took in elven ears, Farstrider armor, then swords. His expression hardened.

changes.before: His jaw set.
changes.after: He set his jaw.

changes.before: It all looked normal. That was the problem.
changes.after: It all looked normal.

changes.before: He looked at Jaina for the first time.
changes.after: Only then did he turn to Jaina.

changes.before: Jaina met his gaze and kept still.
changes.after: Jaina kept still.

changes.before: The common-house back room had been made into an infirmary in the way villages made anything into anything when they had no choice. Shelves gone. Three bunks against one wall. Four pallets on the floor.
changes.after: Shelves gone, three bunks against one wall, four pallets on the floor.

changes.before: Not a cure. A pause. Time bought at cost.
changes.after: Not a cure. A pause.

changes.before: She looked toward the bakery through the corner of the window.
changes.after: The bakery was just visible through the corner of the window.

changes.before: The girl's shoulders eased by a fraction.
changes.after: The girl relaxed by a fraction.

changes.before: She was already looking to Jaina for the rest of it.
changes.after: She was already waiting for Jaina's half of it.

changes.before: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses and felt only the weight of the next door ahead.
changes.after: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses.

changes.before: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses and felt only the weight of the next door ahead.
changes.after: Instead she heard coughing somewhere behind the row of houses.

changes.before: "In two villages, with the same kind of man attached to it," Sylvanas said.
changes.after: "In two villages, with the same grain seller behind it," Sylvanas said.

changes.before: The room went very still.
changes.after: No one moved.

changes.before: The room went very still.
changes.after: No one moved.

changes.before: Millhaven clicked into place: same brown coat, same good prices, same pleasant face.
changes.after: Same brown coat, same good prices, same pleasant face.

changes.before: Millhaven clicked into place: same brown coat, same good prices, same pleasant face.
changes.after: Same brown coat, same good prices, same pleasant face.

changes.before: "An iron ring on his right hand. Worn. I couldn't make out the sign." He swallowed. "He said if anything went wrong, I should be fast about it. Said it was for the greater good."
changes.after: "An iron ring on his right hand. Worn. I couldn't make out the sign. He said if anything went wrong, I should be fast about it. Said it was for the greater good."

changes.before: "If I get caught." His throat worked. "He said to be fast."
changes.after: "If I get caught." The words scraped out of him. "He said to be fast."

changes.before: "If I get caught." His throat worked. "He said to be fast."
changes.after: "If I get caught." The words scraped out of him. "He said to be fast."

changes.before: She did not look at Sylvanas. She knew too well what the other half of that promise might be worth.
changes.after: She knew too well what the other half of that promise might be worth.

changes.before: Cyndia checked the window from the yard and came back with a raised finger: covered.
changes.after: Cyndia checked the window from the yard and came back with a raised finger. Covered.

changes.before: Not a spell. Poison.
changes.after: Poison.

changes.before: "He was trained for this," Sylvanas said again. No more force in the voice, only more certainty.
changes.after: "He was trained for this," Sylvanas said again, lower now.

changes.before: "That's planning. That's reach."
changes.after: "Someone put a village boy in that granary with poison ready and orders for when to use it."

changes.before: She looked down the hall toward the granary.
changes.after: She turned down the hall toward the granary.

changes.before: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs as if nothing had changed.
changes.after: Outside, the village kept coughing in the cold morning while bread smoke rose over the roofs unchanged.
